questions.question: A company adopts an agile methodology to reduce the cost of change in their software development process. What is one key principle of agile that supports this approach?
questions.hint: Focus on the agile principles that enable frequent changes and adaptations

questions.question: An organization is considering a major software upgrade that will significantly change their existing system. What is a potential cost of change in this scenario?
questions.hint: Consider the costs associated with implementing a new system, such as training personnel and migrating data

questions.question: A software development team is using an agile approach and encounters a change in requirements mid-project. What is one way to minimize the cost of change in this situation?
questions.hint: Focus on the iterative and incremental nature of agile, and how it enables teams to adapt to changing requirements
